reviews.comment:
Es una estación de servicio, los baños limpios!!!!eso es importante, para todos los que pasamos por ahí!!!

(Translated by Google)
It's a gas station, and the bathrooms are clean! That's important for everyone who passes by!

reviews.comment:
La estación de servicio más antigua que recuerdo. Mucha fila por la ubicación y muy tranquilos los muchachos para trabajar, mucha paz.

(Translated by Google)
The oldest gas station I can remember. There was always a long line because of its location, but the guys working there were very calm and peaceful.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1981887218224238304/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNtdkt6WGZnEAE

reviews.comment:
En El Bolsón todo es lindo!!!

(Translated by Google)
Everything is beautiful in El Bolsón!!!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1981887218224238304/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNtMkoyTThRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Cargar combustibles en ACA El Bolsón, además de la doble tranquilidad que brindan YPF y ACA, tiene varios otros plus. Quienes gusten de la arquitectura local podrán admirar un claro representante del estilo Bustillo, quienes prefieran pagar con la aplicación será destino obligado en la zona y quienes tengan que esperar o encontrarse con alguien lo harán con la inmejorable vista del Cerro Piltriquitron.

(Translated by Google)
Refueling at ACA El Bolsón, in addition to the peace of mind offered by YPF and ACA, has several other advantages. Those who appreciate local architecture can admire a prime example of the Bustillo style; those who prefer to pay with the app will find it a must-visit in the area; and those who have to wait or meet someone will do so with the unbeatable view of Cerro Piltriquitron.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1981887218224238304/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNtbU9DWUlnEAE
